what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a design-assets channel image named 'image (20)' at icons/image (20); it stores asset identity, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, versioning, provenance, and an empty alt text, with no rendered content beyond YAML frontmatter.
observations: This is a channel-memory asset card for an image/icon, not source code.
The asset has zero width and zero height (w: 0, h: 0).
The MIME type is image/png but dimensions are unspecified.
The source is 'dragnet' and the author session is 'ch-3mpkjg3r'.
The version block duplicates the top-level metadata and includes an empty alt field.
There are no links to other assets or symbols in this file.
standouts: Zero-dimension image/png asset record with empty alt text.
Version metadata is fully duplicated under versions[0].
concerns: Width and height are 0, which may indicate the image dimensions were not extracted or the asset is a placeholder.
Alt text is empty, which may reduce accessibility/discoverability.
The generic name 'image (20)' gives no semantic hint about the icon's meaning.
notes: A bare metadata stub for an icon asset in the design-assets channel, likely awaiting richer description or dimension extraction.
questions: Why are the width and height zero for a PNG asset?
What icon or symbol does 'image (20)' represent?
Is the empty alt intentional or missing?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to catalog an image asset, and it does so, but the catalog entry is incomplete (zero dimensions, empty alt, generic name) relative to a fully descriptive asset record.
apparent_themes: Binary asset indirection via blob references
Minimal metadata stubs for design systems
intention_signals: It seems intended to register a captured icon/image asset into a shared design-assets ledger so it can be referenced by address and versioned, even though descriptive metadata has not yet been filled in.
contribution: Provides a stable addressable identity (image://design-assets/icons/image (20)), blob reference, and version history for a design asset, enabling a fused system to locate, version, and later enrich the asset without embedding binary data in the ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger card for a zero-dimension image/png icon asset named 'image (20)' in the design-assets/icons path, referencing a B2 blob and recording dragnet provenance and an empty alt.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version a captured design-assets icon so it can be referenced by a stable address and enriched later.
suggested_fields: semantic_tags or icon_meaning to describe what the icon represents
extraction_status to indicate whether dimensions/alt are pending
proposed_edge_kinds: depicts or represents for semantic subject of an icon
derived_from for the dragnet capture source
